status_line: Monday 5:41 AM ET / 9:41 AM UTC — sixth straight quiet creative hour, and SARAH Run 117 (09:06 UTC) walked back Run 116's Downloads-access claim: the osascript bridge that broke through last hour only works in interactive sessions where Rick can approve Mac control, so scheduled-task runs can't use it. Downloads is unreadable again from autonomous SARAH; the durable fix is granting ~/Downloads as a Cowork directory. Tray holds at 9 — Open Items #7–#9 (Higgsfield MP4, Process Page spec PDF, Rick Directing Photos folder) all still parked, just unverifiable this hour. Output tree steady at 1,053 files; sarah-log.md now ~725 KB. The 09:04 receipt filer caught a single Tesla Insurance $30.18 auto-debit and filed it to April 2026 Personal — clean run, 0 needs-review. GUARDIAN ticks to 52 consecutive cycles dark, still gating Sharpie platform-bible validation, T2 Final scoring, and Gallery client delivery. NOLAN still iterating the Sharpie outro. Lands' End / Sarah Sylvester clock now at T-3 days and counting. No new MAESTRO/WRITER output since 02:46.
